prompt: Create a computer graphics CAD model rendering of a bicycle similar in design to the reference image. Depict a technical view, perhaps wireframe or simple shaded, focusing on the geometric structure.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics CAD model rendering of a bicycle, specifically featuring a step-through frame, front basket, and fenders as shown in image 1. Present the bicycle from a side profile technical view. The rendering should focus on the geometric structure, displayed either as a precise wireframe model or with a simple, flat-shaded appearance.
